conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo - [Your Company Name] Interest

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this finds you well.

My name is [Your Name] and I am the [Your Title] at [Your Company Name]. We have been following the development of [Product Name] and are very impressed with [mention something specific you like about the product, e.g., its features, its approach to X problem, recent updates].

We are currently evaluating solutions to [briefly state the problem you are trying to solve or the goal you are trying to achieve], and we believe [Product Name] could be a strong fit for our needs.

Would you be available sometime in the coming weeks for a brief product demonstration? We are particularly interested in seeing how [mention a specific feature or use case relevant to your needs] works in practice.

Please let me know what dates and times work best for your schedule. I am flexible and happy to work around your availability.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Website (Optional)]<turn|>
